summary.zh: 多语言界面更完整，定时任务更可靠，国内用户也能从 AtomGit 镜像收到更新。
summary.en: Broader locale coverage, more reliable scheduled tasks, and AtomGit mirror delivery for users in China.

summary.zh: 正式版构建完成后会自动同步到 AtomGit 发布仓库，自动更新优先走国内镜像。
summary.en: Release builds now sync to the AtomGit release repo so in-app updates can prefer the domestic mirror.

sources.title: feat: mirror releases to atomgit after build
fix: target normal atomgit release repo

summary.zh: 日语、韩语、繁体中文补齐主要界面文案，聊天、输入框和设置里的硬编码文字也改走翻译。
summary.en: Japanese, Korean, and Traditional Chinese now cover the main UI, with chat, input, and settings strings routed through i18n.

sources.title: fix(i18n): backfill locale parity and replace hardcoded UI strings

summary.zh: 修复下次运行时间的游标计算，Studio 定时任务不再漏跑或重复触发。
summary.en: Fixes next-run cursor calculation so Studio scheduled tasks fire on time without duplicate triggers.

sources.title: fix: repair cron next run cursor
